name: Markdownify MCP
description: MCP server that converts PDFs, images, audio files, and web pages into clean Markdown for efficient LLM ingestion and RAG pipeline construction.

skills.name: PDF to Markdown
skills.description: Convert PDF documents to clean Markdown preserving headings, tables, and text formatting

skills.name: Image Text Extraction
skills.description: Extract and convert text from images to Markdown using OCR for LLM-ready document ingestion

skills.name: Web Page Convert
skills.description: Fetch any web page and convert its main content to clean Markdown stripping ads and navigation

skills.name: Audio Transcription
skills.description: Transcribe audio files to Markdown text for inclusion in RAG pipelines or agent knowledge bases
